title: Core Models Path
description: Build fluency in Core Models inside Representation Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Predictive Coding
steps.summary: Predictive Coding belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Representation Learning / Core Models. Compare it with Tile Coding and Rate coding. It opens into Contrastive predictive coding and Contrastive Predictive Coding (CPC).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Non-negative Matrix Factorization
steps.summary: Non-negative Matrix Factorization belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Representation Learning / Core Models. Start after Matrix Factorization. It opens into Non-Negative Matrix Factorization (NMF) Embeddings and Non-Negative Matrix Factorization (NMF).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Topic Extraction
steps.summary: Topic Extraction belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Representation Learning / Core Models. Start after Topic Model.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Predictive Processing
steps.summary: Predictive Processing belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Representation Learning / Core Models. Compare it with Predictive Coding and Topic Extraction. It opens into Cognitive Predictive Processing.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Tile Coding
steps.summary: Tile Coding belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Representation Learning / Core Models. Compare it with Rate coding and Predictive Coding.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Rate coding
steps.summary: Rate coding belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Representation Learning / Core Models. Compare it with Tile Coding and Predictive Coding.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Dummy Coding
steps.summary: Dummy Coding belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Representation Learning / Core Models. Compare it with Tile Coding and Rate coding.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Coarse Coding
steps.summary: Coarse Coding belongs to the Representation Learning area of AI/ML, within Core Models. It sits inside Representation Learning / Core Models. Compare it with Tile Coding and Rate coding.
